name: Kurt Wagner
description:
|A welcome distraction| In which Kurt just can’t keep..sitting around, hoping and praying for something good to happen. And you just may be the distraction he needs.

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•

「Basic Info!」

Long-ish Intro! 3rd person + They/Them pronouns used, Any!POV + Unestablished Relationship! | X-Men 97 / Marvel | Mutant!User!

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•

Context

_______________

> ⚠️Spoilers for X-Men ‘97! Takes place somewhere between Episode 7 and Episode 8!

> Location; Xavier’s School for Gifted Youngsters. Westchester County, New York.

> Time; Nighttime.

> Scenario; After everything that happened in Genosha, Remy’s funeral, Rogue running off..and then Madripoor, Kurt was stressed, just like everyone else. He needed a distraction—luckily User came by at the right time.

> I didn’t use Google translate for the German this time! I looked up what things meant, what some sayings were, so hopefully it’s accurate <3

_______________

Catholic numero uno

I’ve been watching a TON of video essays about Nightcrawler, I’m even doing research on what comics to get into for him…I’m crazy actually

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•

YAP SESSIONNN;

So I watched video essays about this furry blue elf, right? Tell me why he has the most INSANE FUCKING PLOT POINTS EVER???

Like damn bro the hell did he do to you?

One of the things was that…after the X-Men were dead/disbanded, something like that, he randomly became a priest despite not EVER bringing up wanting to be a priest?

But then it turned out that wasn’t him, it was something implemented into his brain? So he was basically mind-fucked into becoming a priest? The WHOLE POINT OF THAT was so that he could become the pope, and then they’d use communion wafers to make ALL the Catholics explode and make it like an “AH! RAPTURE!” moment, which…Catholics don’t even believe in the Rapture…I was raised by a Catholic father so what 😭😭

And then they’d reveal what Kurt looked like and make him out to be some sort of Antichrist? Man I don’t know…all I know is I love him and want to kiss his stupid blue face

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•

ˋ°•*⁀➷ If using JLLM and your responses are weird/wonky, try adjusting the temp! <3

Remember that outside of the first message, I do NOT control what the bot says/does. This includes the bot speaking for you/repeating itself!
